title: 6. Cost & Usage Observability
description: Cost per request, spend totals, token usage, context window fill, and cache savings.

options.content: 1. Infrastructure2. Network3. AI4. Data5. User6. Cost & Usage7. Safety & Security

panels.title: Output tokens
panels.description: Total completion (output) tokens consumed in the selected time range.

panels.title: Avg tokens / request
panels.description: Average prompt + completion + cache tokens per request.

panels.title: Context fill

targets.expr: avg(avg_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | operation_name=~"$operation" | unwrap context_window_utilization_pct [5m]))

panels.description: Average context window utilization % — how full prompts are across models.

panels.title: Errors (5m)
panels.description: Exception count increase in the last 5 minutes.

panels.title: Cost
panels.description: Per-request cost and daily/monthly spend totals

panels.title: Cost per request

targets.expr: avg(avg_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | operation_name=~"$operation" | unwrap cost_usd [5m]))

avg by (model_name) (avg_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | operation_name=~"$operation" | unwrap cost_usd [5m]))

panels.description: Average USD cost per request from log field `cost_usd`. Source: Loki `telemetry_event` (synthetic generator computes per-model pricing).

panels.title: Cost per user/session
panels.description: Average cost per request over time — `increase(cost) / increase(requests)` from Prometheus (Loki per-user ratios exceed local query resolution limits in range mode).

panels.title: Daily/monthly spend
panels.description: Total USD spent: 24h and 30d `increase` on `ai_gateway_request_cost_USD_total`.

panels.title: Cost breakdown
Cost by department
panels.description: Share of 24h LLM spend by internal department (`department` label). Each user belongs to one department within the organization.

panels.title: Model-wise cost breakdown
panels.description: 24h spend ranked by `model_name` — which models are most expensive.
Department and model cost distribution

panels.title: Savings
Cache hit savings

targets.expr: sum(sum_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | operation_name=~"$operation" | unwrap cache_savings_usd [5m]))

sum by (model_name) (sum_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | operation_name=~"$operation" | unwrap cache_savings_usd [5m]))

panels.description: USD saved via prompt cache hits (`cache_savings_usd` in logs). Higher values mean caching is reducing billable prompt tokens.
USD saved from cache hits

panels.title: Output throughput
panels.description: Token generation rate by model

panels.title: Output Token Count
panels.description: Stacked completion-token throughput by model — each band is one model's share.

panels.title: Output tokens by model (now)
panels.description: Instantaneous completion tokens/s per model — ranked horizontal bar gauge.

panels.title: Request composition
Token type mix
panels.description: Donut chart of prompt vs completion vs cache_read tokens in the last hour.

panels.title: Total tokens per request
panels.description: Average total tokens per request over time (single aggregate trend line).

panels.title: Prompt size by model
panels.description: Average prompt tokens per request ranked by model — horizontal bar gauge.
Prompt vs completion token mix

panels.title: Context window
Context Window Utilization (%)

targets.expr: avg(avg_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | operation_name=~"$operation" | unwrap context_window_utilization_pct [5m]))

panels.description: Dial gauge of average context window fill — high values risk truncation.

panels.title: Context fill by model

targets.expr: sort_desc(avg by (model_name) (avg_over_time({service_name=~".+"} | json | event_type="telemetry_event" | department=~"$department" | region=~"$region" | model_provider=~"$provider" | model_name=~"$model" | operation_name=~"$operation" | unwrap context_window_utilization_pct [5m])))

panels.description: Context window utilization % ranked by model.

panels.title: Prompt size trend
panels.description: Average prompt (input) tokens per request over time — drives cost and latency.
Context window fill and prompt size trends

panels.title: Streaming throughput & errors
Errors by type (5m)
panels.description: Bar chart of exceptions in the last 5m broken down by `error_type`.
Error spikes during token streaming
